Guides

Curated paths through Wikiwiki knowledge.

Articles

Start with the public wiki

ArticleFor users

Getting started

Install the npm package, set up a repo wiki, generate the site, and verify the first local output.

getting-startedinstructionshomepage
ArticleFor everyone

Project overview

Wikiwiki keeps local article-first project wikis beside the code, with structured records as the durable source of truth.

productoverviewhomepage
ArticleFor everyone

Agent setup

Install the Codex-compatible wk skill so agents can run the same local wiki protocol as the CLI.

agentcodexinstructions
ArticleFor users

FAQ and troubleshooting

Common fixes for npm installs, missing generated sites, Beads coordination, and npm Trusted Publishing releases.

faqtroubleshootingrelease
ArticleFor everyone

Workflows

Use status/spin for orientation, records for durable knowledge, render/site for output, and closeout for reviewable end-of-work packets.

workflowinstructionsmaintenance

Start here

Project essentials

No high-signal records captured yet.

Experience

Concepts to understand first

Concept

Append-only record revisions

Record updates append a new JSONL revision with the same logical id, while deletes append a tombstone that active reads, rendering, and search...

recordsv1architecture
Concept

CLI-first knowledge store

Wikiwiki stores repo knowledge as validated JSONL records and renders deterministic Markdown pages.

mvparchitecture
Concept

Daily agent loop

Wikiwiki V1 supports a CLI-first loop for status, spin, structured capture, revision, validation, rendering, and local search.

cliv1agent-workflow
Concept

Human-facing static wiki site

Wikiwiki generates a first-class static HTML site for humans while preserving Markdown and JSONL artifacts for agents.

siteuxdxhuman-wiki
Concept

Portable reporting paths

Wikiwiki emits POSIX-style paths in machine-readable JSON and generated manifests while keeping native filesystem paths internally.

windowspathsdxagent-workflow
Concept

Role-oriented human wiki compiler

Wikiwiki can compile structured records into UX and DX human wiki drafts for IDE agents to turn into polished prose.

compileuxdxagent-workflow

Rationale

Decisions that shaped the project

Decision

Make generated sites project-first

Render generated sites as the user project wiki first: use project identity in titles and navigation, keep only a small Created with Wikiwiki footer...

siteuxhuman-wikithemehomepage
DecisionFor everyone

Use deterministic wiki profiles for first-pass seeding

Add user, developer, and mixed wiki profiles that define target record counts, audience tags, page emphasis, and stable first-pass seed templates.

productdogfoodprofilesdocs
Decision

Compile UX and DX human wikis through agent-mediated drafts

Generate both UX and DX compile drafts by default, let the active IDE agent author the prose, then validate and publish the result with wk compile...

compileuxdxagent-workflowagentic-ide
Decision

Generate a static HTML site for human wiki browsing

Add wk site as a separate static site generator that reads structured records, preserves wk render Markdown output, and writes a browsable wiki-site/...

siteuxdxhuman-wikistatic
Decision

Make generated sites publishable without adjacent repo files

Support .wikiwiki/config.json source_base_url and wk site --source-base-url, with CLI override winning; use remote source URLs when configured and...

sitegithub-pagessource-linksdx
Decision

Support script-first wiki automation

Position Wikiwiki as a deterministic CLI and scriptable wiki generator first, with optional agentic IDE instructions that expand record capture...

productautomationagentsdocs

Docs map

Agent-maintained record indexes

8 records Concepts

Durable explanations, domain terms, product ideas, and system concepts.

 17 records Decisions

Product, architecture, workflow, and implementation decisions with rationale.

 28 records Devlog

 7 records Symbols

Important code symbols and where maintainers should look first.
